name: rad-writer
description: Domain-aware writing assistance across 9 genres (email, blog, web copy, business reports, research, presentations, prose, technical docs, social) with explicit honesty about what AI-pattern detection can and cannot claim in 2026. Four skills (write, improve, review, ai-audit), two agents (voice-analyst, writing-reviewer), two Python scripts (text-stats.py, check-blocklist.py) that deterministically measure burstiness, em-dash density, hedging, transitions, and lexical tells. AI patterns organized by durability tier — leads with structural/semantic signals (specificity gap, copula avoidance, rule-of-three abuse) over lexical word lists (delve/leverage/foster) which are being deprecated by newer models. Voice profiles for register/tone matching, with EMNLP-2025-grounded honesty about idiosyncratic-voice limits.
